category_sources: source_facts.description says it converts HCL2 to JSON; official GitHub README is the project homepage in source_facts.homepage.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide hcl2json.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available project documentation; source_facts.homepage points to the same GitHub project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/tmccombs/hcl2json, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies HCL2 to JSON conversion; source_facts.executables lists the hcl2json CLI.
